subject: test(components): add render and interaction tests for all CV sections and PWA hooks
body:
Adds 56 new tests across 3 test files, bringing the total to 108:
- Component render tests for Hero, About, Experience, Education, Skills, Projects
- InterestForm interaction tests covering validation, submission, honeypot, and error states
- PWA hook tests for usePWAInstall (install prompt, appinstalled event) and usePWAUpdate

Adds @testing-library/react and @testing-library/user-event as dev dependencies.
Adds vitest resolve alias for virtual:pwa-register/react (Vite virtual module unavailable in test mode).

Tags: testing, components, pwa, hooks, forms
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: test-coverage
Semver: minor
